thread: Will Uther’s warning about Arthas matter before the prince burns too hot to stop?

evidence.clue: Uther tells Sylvanas that Arthas has never known how to step back from a fight once he thinks the field chose him.
The warning lands after Arthas has already mobilized, so it changes no immediate action but reframes all future consequences.

readerKnows: Arthas now carries a named catastrophe vector inside a seemingly correct mobilization.
povCharacterKnows: Sylvanas believes Uther because she has already watched Arthas turn understanding into dangerous speed.
notes: New in chapter 11. Keep open until Hearthglen, Stratholme, or another later consequence pays this warning off.
